title: Saying Thank You 表达感谢
scene: Lucy生病了，同学们来看望她，她表示感谢。

lines.en: Hi, Lucy! How are you feeling today?
lines.zh: 嗨，露西！你今天感觉怎么样？

lines.en: Much better, Emma. Thank you for coming to see me.
lines.zh: 好多了，艾玛。谢谢来看我。

lines.en: I brought you some fruit and a get-well card.
lines.zh: 我给你带了些水果和一张康复卡。

lines.en: Oh, that's so sweet! You didn't have to do that.
lines.zh: 哦，太贴心了！你不用这么麻烦的。

lines.en: We all miss you at school. The class made this card together.
lines.zh: 我们在学校都想你。全班一起做了这张卡。

lines.en: I'm so touched! Please thank everyone for me.
lines.zh: 我太感动了！请替我谢谢大家。

lines.en: Here are my class notes from this week.
lines.zh: 这是我本周的课堂笔记。

lines.en: You're the best friend ever! This helps a lot.
lines.zh: 你真是最好的朋友！这帮了大忙了。

lines.en: Don't worry about school. Just rest and get well.
lines.zh: 别担心学校的事。好好休息，快快好起来。

lines.en: Thank you, Emma. You always make me feel better.
lines.zh: 谢谢你，艾玛。你总是让我感觉好多了。
